name: Karate OC
description: Games, Obstacle Courses, Laser Tag, Pizza, Drinks, and Movies! For ages 5+

name: Valhallan Esports Lake Forest
description: These happen 2-3 times each month and include pizza, drinks, and a night of fun coached game play. Use code OCPG to get 50% off parents night out!

name: Cal Elite Kids
description: Offered every Saturday night. Each week has a fun theme for the kids along with pizza, activities, and a movie.

name: Sweet Peas Gymnastics
description: Offered every Saturday night. Kids enjoy an evening of gymnastics, games, pizza, and fun! Kids must be 3-13 and potty trained. Rates range from $27-$30.

name: Lil' Chef School
description: Offered once a month. Each month is a different theme. Kids learn to cook while parents enjoy a night out!

name: City Parents Night Out Events
description: Offered occasionally. Totally free programs run by local cities. Check your city parks and rec department for upcoming dates.

name: Bumo Care
description: Drop-in childcare available in Costa Mesa and Irvine. Ages 8 months to 11 years. Great for parents night out or anytime you need childcare!

name: Kidz Korner
description: Drop-in childcare center with hourly rates. Open evenings and weekends. Perfect for parents night out!

name: Kids Park
description: Hourly drop-in childcare center. Open 7 days a week with extended evening hours on weekends. Ages 2-12.
